{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Shoumei’s Shadow
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Shoumei’s Shadow]] is a mass of blood essence that can strengthen [[Lindon's body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
